## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's style guidelines (TypeScript strict, Tailwind tokens)
- [ ] No game logic added to client-side code (Edge Functions only)
- [ ] No hardcoded Supabase storage URLs (use `sigilUrl()` / `storageUrl()`)
- [ ] No `AS RESTRICTIVE` RLS policies
- [ ] DB changes are in a migration file, not direct SQL
- [ ] Uses in-app terminology (Herald, Lord Commander, Loyalist, etc.)
- [ ] Tested on mobile and desktop
